narrative:
Chesapeake Union Ex Vill Sd (Lawrence) exempted village school district has 4,812 registered voters, with 59.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.0 percentage points.
